  • Constructor Details

    • InterestedPartyUpdate

      public InterestedPartyUpdate(Optional<? extends PostalAddressUpdate> mailingAddress, Optional<String> recipient, Optional<? extends InterestedPartyUpdateStatementDeliveryPreference> statementDeliveryPreference, Optional<? extends InterestedPartyUpdateTradeConfirmationDeliveryPreference> tradeConfirmationDeliveryPreference)

    • InterestedPartyUpdate

      public InterestedPartyUpdate()

  • Method Details

    • mailingAddress

      public Optional<PostalAddressUpdate> mailingAddress()
      Represents a postal address, e.g. for postal delivery or payments addresses. Given a postal address, a postal service can deliver items to a premise, P.O. Box or similar. It is not intended to model geographical locations (roads, towns, mountains).

      In typical usage an address would be created via user input or from importing existing data, depending on the type of process.

      Advice on address input / editing: - Use an i18n-ready address widget such as https://github.com/google/libaddressinput) - Users should not be presented with UI elements for input or editing of fields outside countries where that field is used.

      For more guidance on how to use this schema, please see: https://support.google.com/business/answer/6397478

    • recipient

      public Optional<String> recipient()
      The sending address name for mailings to Interested Parties The name of an Interested Party; Used for envelope/communication addressing

    • statementDeliveryPreference

      public Optional<InterestedPartyUpdateStatementDeliveryPreference> statementDeliveryPreference()
      Delivery method instruction for account statements for a given Interested Party; Can be `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `PHYSICAL` on party creation

    • tradeConfirmationDeliveryPreference

      public Optional<InterestedPartyUpdateTradeConfirmationDeliveryPreference> tradeConfirmationDeliveryPreference()
      Delivery method instruction for trade confirmations for a given Interested Party record; Can be `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `PHYSICAL` on party creation

    • builder

      public static InterestedPartyUpdate.Builder builder()

    • withMailingAddress

      public InterestedPartyUpdate withMailingAddress(PostalAddressUpdate mailingAddress)
      Represents a postal address, e.g. for postal delivery or payments addresses. Given a postal address, a postal service can deliver items to a premise, P.O. Box or similar. It is not intended to model geographical locations (roads, towns, mountains).

      In typical usage an address would be created via user input or from importing existing data, depending on the type of process.

      Advice on address input / editing: - Use an i18n-ready address widget such as https://github.com/google/libaddressinput) - Users should not be presented with UI elements for input or editing of fields outside countries where that field is used.

      For more guidance on how to use this schema, please see: https://support.google.com/business/answer/6397478

    • withMailingAddress

      public InterestedPartyUpdate withMailingAddress(Optional<? extends PostalAddressUpdate> mailingAddress)
      Represents a postal address, e.g. for postal delivery or payments addresses. Given a postal address, a postal service can deliver items to a premise, P.O. Box or similar. It is not intended to model geographical locations (roads, towns, mountains).

      In typical usage an address would be created via user input or from importing existing data, depending on the type of process.

      Advice on address input / editing: - Use an i18n-ready address widget such as https://github.com/google/libaddressinput) - Users should not be presented with UI elements for input or editing of fields outside countries where that field is used.

      For more guidance on how to use this schema, please see: https://support.google.com/business/answer/6397478

      public InterestedPartyUpdate withStatementDeliveryPreference(InterestedPartyUpdateStatementDeliveryPreference statementDeliveryPreference)
      Delivery method instruction for account statements for a given Interested Party; Can be `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `PHYSICAL` on party creation
